zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Northwood I於1254年4月24日出生在英國肯特時，他的父親Roger Northwood40歲，母親Bona FitzBernard22歲。他和Joan Badlesmere至少有7個兒子和1個女兒。他於1304年被列為sheriff of kent 。他去世於1319年5月26日在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國肯特明斯特 在 謝坡。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Northwood I于1254年4月24日出生在英国肯特时，他的父亲Roger Northwood40岁，母亲Bona FitzBernard22岁。他和Joan Badlesmere至少有7个儿子和1个女儿。他于1304年被列为sheriff of kent 。他去世于1319年5月26日在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国肯特明斯特 在 謝坡。

nameMeanings.name: Northwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2  English: perhaps also a variant of   Northard  .

variants.name: Norwood
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called Northwood or Norwood, such as Northwood in Essex, Middlesex, Isle of Wight, Norwood in Middlesex and Surrey, or Northwood Farm in Okehampton and Northwood Farm in Morchard Bishop, both in Devon. The placenames mean ‘north or northern wood’, from Old English north ‘north, northern’ + wudu ‘wood’ or Middle English north + wode. Compare Norrod .

variants.name: Northard
meanings: 1 English: locative name from Middle English northward ‘northward’, for someone who dwells to the north.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Northwood I was born on 24 April 1254, in Kent, England, his father, Roger Northwood, was 40 and his mother, Bona FitzBernard, was 22. He had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Joan Badlesmere. In 1304, his occupation is listed as sheriff of kent . He died on 26 May 1319, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Minster in Sheppey, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Northwood I est né le 24 avril 1254, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Roger Northwood, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Bona FitzBernard, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec Joan Badlesmere. En 1304, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of kent . Il est décédé le 26 mai 1319, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Minster in Sheppey, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Northwood I am 24. April 1254 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Northwood 40 und seine Mutter Bona FitzBernard 22. Er hatte mit Joan Badlesmere mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1304 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of kent  aufgeführt. Er starb am 26. Mai 1319 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Minster in Sheppey, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Northwood I è nato il il 24 aprile 1254 nel Kent, England, il suo padre, Roger Northwood, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Bona FitzBernard, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con Joan Badlesmere. Nel 1304, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of kent . Morì il 26 maggio 1319, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Minster in Sheppey, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Northwood Iが1254年4月24日にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Roger Northwoodは40歳，母Bona FitzBernardは22歳であった。彼はJoan Badlesmereとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。1304年，職業はsheriff of kent と記録されている。彼は1319年5月26日に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスケントミンスター イン シェッピーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Northwood I(이)가 1254년 4월 24일 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Northwood(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Bona FitzBernard(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Joan Badlesmere(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1304년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of kent 이었다. 그는 1319년 5월 26일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 민스터 인 셰피에 묻혔다.

pt.24 April 1254–26 May 1319: 24 de abril de 1254–26 de maio de 1319

pt.Northwoode Chastiners,Isle Of Sheppey,Ke: Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Northwood I nasceu em 24 de abril de 1254, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Northwood, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Bona FitzBernard, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com Joan Badlesmere. Em 1304, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of kent . Ele faleceu em 26 de maio de 1319, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Minster in Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Northwood I родился 24 апреля 1254 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Northwood было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Bona FitzBernard, 22. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Joan Badlesmere. В 1304 году он работал по профессии sheriff of kent . Он умер 26 мая 1319 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности минстир ин шеппи, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Northwood I nació el 24 de abril de 1254, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Northwood, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Bona FitzBernard, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija con Joan Badlesmere. En 1304, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of kent . Murió el 26 de mayo de 1319, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Minster in Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra.
